heading: Limitation on use of sliding scales
label: 5163 Limitation on use of sliding scales
text: No geographic area shall be precluded from receiving assistance under this chapter solely by virtue of an arithmetic formula or sliding scale based on income or population.
notes: References in TextThis chapter, referred to in text, was in the original “this Act”, meaning , , . For complete classification of this Act to the Code, see Short Title note set out under and Tables.Pub. L. 93–28888 Stat. 143section 5121 of this titleMay 22, 1974
